title: Come Clean to Dad — FAFSA, Common App, Dave Selinger, Culinary Sink
html:
TL;DR

  • Senior-year-of-high-school sprint list, Oct 25 2020 — opens with the loaded line "-come clean to dad" before pivoting straight to FAFSA, Common App, Ford, OSU opportunities, other scholarships, getting A's.
  • The "come clean to dad" item is uncontextualized — no detail on what the confession is — but its position at the top of the list above the entire college-application architecture is the load-bearing signal. Whatever it was had to be cleared before the bureaucratic work could start.
  • Capitalized line: "TALKING TO DAVE SELINGER" — early mention of the Selinger mentor relationship that recurs through 2020 (2020 04 23 go to diamond, 2020 07 28 read book yli summer prep). The all-caps treatment marks Selinger as a high-priority brokered access point.
  • Lower half is a culinary practice list — sink video, bread and butter, active yeast, heavy cream, béchamel chicken and pasta, recipes in culinary class. Captures the Grants Pass high-school culinary track running parallel to the scholarship sprint.
  • Closes with the OSU admissions email (osuadmit@oregonstate.edu) — the institutional gate.
  • Captured Oct 25, 2020, three weeks before the scholarship essays todo dump — same application sprint window.

Key quotes

"-come clean to dad"

"TALKING TO DAVE SELINGER"

Open questions

  • "Come clean to dad" — what about? No follow-up note resolves it; possibly ties to the confession motif in 2020 06 13 dream shooter prep (preparing-for-what's-coming dream-anxiety). Worth flagging in dad wisdom thread.
  • Dave Selinger — frequent mentor name; not yet stubbed. Add to potential entities (recurring across 2020 notes).

Connections
